description.text: Mm. Don't that moral superiority taste good? You feel all kinds of smarter now; who cares about vitamin B12 deficiency?
SMRT. Repeat after me slowly, you are now...SMRRRRRRRT.
You feel distinctly slippery, slimy and hard to get ahold of.
That meal was particularly delicious. You really ought to try selling the recipe to McDiggle's once you're out of here.
Your head spins, your mind whirls. Everything is darkening, and then a bright light seems to be rushing towards you. 'Walk Towards me', it says over and over again. 'Walk towards me...'

The opposite of being drunk, this state of being is as sober as you'll ever be. It strips away the illusions, the comforting pink fog in which people normally spend their lives, and lets them see and think clearly for the first time ever. Then, after they've screamed a bit, they make sure to never get knurd again.
That was simply...wonderful.
I say, good chap. Could you be so kind as to give those uncouth ruffians over there what-for? It'd definitely be a jolly good show.
So much sugar in your system is making you feel sick, if hyper.
You gotta pity the foo' who thinks they're too good for milk.
Behold, the power of FRUIT!
Seriously, drinking something with a name like 'Hurricane' should've tipped you off.
The pure, sparkling spirits cool you to your core and makes you feel more refreshed than your standard drink.
Fight like a tiger, sting like a bee! Or was it fight like a bee and sting like a tiger? Who cares? Go get them, tiger!
'Eat your seaweed, son,' my dad said to me when I was young. 'It's got plenty of iron.' Well, I did, and look at me now! I didn't ask for this!
Glucose - the body's primary fuel.

Four out of five wizards agree that a healthy intake of calcium in one's diet is essential to one's magical faculties. Then again, nine out of ten also agree that it's a good idea to get stone drunk in the middle of the road.
Dwarven war paint often contains zinc in order to help defend against Elven hippiemancy, a most dreaded and potent school of magic.
Ugh, that tasted simply awful! Hope it's as potent a tonic as they say.
Just...gotta have a little more of that skoom - I mean, stuff. I can stop any time I want. Really.
Brblblblblblblblbl. You feel more alert and can shrug off pain easier; you feel like you can take on whole hordes and come out on top!
You're seeing things. You're hearing things, too. They're not altogether unpleasant, though.
AUUUGGGHHH! AAA! AAA! AARRGGGHHH! FOOD AND SLEEP IS FOR THE WEAK! WHY CAN'T I STOP YELLING?
Time to leave them eating your dust, you trailblazer!
You're moving at a blur! Hack and slash!
You can crush and daze others with the sheer brutality of your attacks!
Your blood has turned to acid and spurts all over the place when enemies strike you in melee.
Mmm. You feel alert and focused, regenerating mana on the go. Or at least, you think you are...it's hard to tell through the alcoholic haze.
It's true! Ninjas CAN'T catch you when you're on fire!
I am rubber, you are glue! Anything you throw at me bounces off and sticks to you!
In another game, we would call this status effect 'Moogled'. No attacks or spells available to you!
Veggies beware.
You have been granted the ability to do combo attacks!
Can you feel it? There is nothing here at all. Time isn't flowing. Space isn't stable. Not quite a world, but at least a small space about you where the rules are broken.
The Fairywodger heals you by way of tingling fungal power.
This guy's armour has been violently ripped apart.
This spell causes rock to explode from beneath an enemy's feet.
The strength of earth wells up in you.
Instant dungeon, just add water.

By busting some sweet dance moves, you set the dance floor on fire, effectively setting all enemies around you on fire. Also more fire beyond that, it's really quite a mess. Greater magical power makes the fire all the hotter.
Ghouls and ghosts beware.
Ghouls and ghosts beware.
Ugh! Oil! Well, let's hope you don't end up in the deep-fat fryer.
Frozen to the ground, eh?
A burst of holy wrath.
Show off your mechanical skill.
Creates pointed stones that float in the air and deal damage when stepped into.
Seems like the remote held.
Your insides have turned to jello as your instability-ridden body tries to work out what it should be. Without hands or feet, you're not going to be able to attack or cast spells.

fountain.name: Alien Autopsy
fountain.text: Cool refreshment swirls in your mind and coalesces into inspiration.

fountain.name: Voltaic Empowerment
fountain.text: The water tingles! Hey, this is fun!

fountain.name: Bolt Grab Bag
fountain.text: Looks like someone's left a bundle of bolts in the bottom.

fountain.name: Brutal Strikes
fountain.text: You feel angry. Really, really angry. People won't like you now.

fountain.name: Righteous Radiance
fountain.text: A wave of calmness washes over your mind, leaving it clean and pristine.

fountain.name: Deflection Draught
fountain.text: The water imbues you with bouncy deflection magics.

fountain.name: Classy
fountain.text: You feel elevated over the undignified, hatless masses.

fountain.name: Hyper Hyped Trigger
fountain.text: A surge of confidence wells up in you.

fountain.name: Thaumaturgic Charge
fountain.text: Energies crawl out of the water and run across your skin.

fountain.name: Wright's Irrefutable Argument
fountain.text: You feel recharged and ready for a long night of sustained action.

fountain.name: Haste
fountain.text: Everything starts moving at a blur. Can someone please stop the room so you can get off?

fountain.name: Magebane Trap Effect
fountain.text: This isn't water in the fountain, it's searing mana!

fountain.name: Food Poisoning
fountain.text: Consumption of non DSHA-compliant fluids can lead to adverse effects.

fountain.name: Evil-lutionary Mishap
fountain.text: Transmutative magics wash over you; everything suddenly seems larger.

fountain.name: Rotfiend Trap Effect
fountain.text: Disgusting slimy water splashes up from the fountain and fouls your food!

description.text: Well, snap. There goes your magic.
Well, snap. There goes your magic.
Well, snap. There goes your magic.
Well, snap. There goes your magic.
Well, snap. There goes your magic.
Well, snap. There goes your magic.
Disgusting putrefaction rapidly seeps through your flesh and possessions.
Disgusting putrefaction rapidly seeps through your flesh and possessions.
The draconic goddess Obsidia has turned a baleful eye on you for slaying her children and defiling her shrine.
The draconic goddess Obsidia has turned a baleful eye on you for slaying her children and defiling her shrine.
Life flows through your body!
The fury of the earth burns inside you! You feel incredibly powerful.

The draconic wind goddess Selzauide has lent you a small portion of Her magical elegance. After so long with only ice and wind for company, She's so happy to be remembered by someone that She doesn't even care that you're not a dragon.

The knowledge of whether Selzauide dislikes lawyers, burglars or golemancers has been lost to time with any meaningful worship of Her, but there is one sure fact: she loathes those who would game her little puzzles.

digglegod.name: Draconic Wind Goddess, Selzauide
digglegod.description: It's an ancient, long-forgotten shrine to the draconic wind goddess, Selzauide.

description.text: Your magical abilities have been siphoned away, leaving you wondering why your spells are fizzling.
Your magical abilities have been siphoned off, making even the smallest of cantrips immensely difficult to cast.
Yuck! Thick, disgusting gunk plasters your body and prevents you from attacking!
description.monsterText: spews thick, disgusting gunk all over you!

description.text: Flame Death Destruction
description.monsterText: begins channelling the power of Obsidia! Run!

description.text: Flame Death Destruction
description.monsterText: erupts in a blossom of fire!

description.text: Your mind has been seared by a surge of magical energies, making them much harder to cast and less likely to go haywire. At least it doesn't last long.
description.monsterText: blasts your mind with arcane power!
summons arcane flares to its aid!

description.text: For shrooms.
description.monsterText: burns your soul with ghostly flame!

description.text: Your body is being rebuilt with alarming speed, tendon upon bone upon skin upon viscera...
Your body is being rebuilt with alarming speed, tendon upon bone upon skin upon viscera...
Your body is being rebuilt with alarming speed, tendon upon bone upon skin upon viscera...
Flame Death Destruction
description.monsterText: spreads warmth and life around it!

description.text: Life flows through your body!
For Svetlana
description.monsterText: calls her children to her aid!

description.text: Blast your ememies with a concentrated burst of light! This spell does righteous damage.
Stun an enemy with a touch from your short-range haywire energies and make your getaway while they're blinded--if they're not dead already!
Your more unstable energies are contained within your personal magnetic field. How long can you keep this up before you turn into a rampaging Japanese monster?

That's what you get for unnecessarily exposing yourself: your defenses are reduced and you're in danger of meltdown! There's no speedy cure for this; you must hurry away and wait for your energies to realign themselves naturally!
You have learnt the hard way that it's not just little girls bearing buckets of water you have to watch out for.
Drain your enemies with this beam!
Uh-oh. Your energies have been disrupted and they're spinning out of control! Run away bravely, Sir Robin!
You may have seen everything, but do you KNOW everything?
Makes invisible enemies visible, debuffs their resistance and reflect severely.
Smite thine enemies with the power of the rainbow! You probably won't find it super effective, but it won't be not very effective, either. Now if only this was a pokemon match...
You're melting! You're MEEEELTINNNG!
FLAME! DEATH! DESTRUCTION! Now let us show them who is the true lord of Blackr--I mean, this dungeon!
Unstable energies swirl around you, warping reality where they pass.
Damage and stun aura.
The actual mine that does the teleportation work.
Forgive me, Generic Monster; your death only adds to my failure. Roaring that loudly has made your throat all scratchy and sore, so take a moment to recover before doing anything else.
The runes on your weapon (or boot) have awakened to help you drain health from your enemies. If you do not constantly feed them the blood of others, they'll take yours instead!

The runes on your weapon (or boot) have awakened to help you drain health from your enemies. If you do not constantly feed them blood of others, they'll take yours instead (at the cost of one health every four rounds)!
Fresh, dripping life-force has awakened the protective runes on your armour.
What? Oh you mean that bloody mess over there? Nope, definitely didn't have anything to do with it.
Your blood is rapidly coming to a boil; enjoy your enhanced killing power while it lasts!
Your blood is rapidly coming to a boil; enjoy your enhanced killing power while it lasts!
Your blood is rapidly coming to a boil; enjoy your enhanced killing power while it lasts!
Your blood is rapidly coming to a boil; enjoy your enhanced killing power while it lasts!
Your blood is rapidly coming to a boil; enjoy your enhanced killing power while it lasts!
Your blood is rapidly coming to a boil; enjoy your enhanced killing power while it lasts!
Does what it says.
Having taken on the aspect of a phoenix, your blood is coming to a (rather painful) boil. Enjoy it while it lasts.

Remember that time when you stole that spaceship from those space goats? Turned out they were space vegetarians who dined on space vegetables, but space goats equal space mutton, and at least you've learned to slice straight from the whole experience.

Remember that time when you stole that spaceship from those space goats? Turned out they were space vegetarians who dined on space vegetables, but space goats equal space mutton, and at least you've learned to slice straight from the whole experience. Costs nine units of blood to use.

For eighteen simple payments of blood (without interest), you can charge the runes on your weapon and become a swirling tornado of bloody death. Lengthy and bore-inducing introduction speech for you and your companions sold separately.
You can try all you want, but being as stuck-up as an elf is something rather out of your reach. Still, the murderous mana-draining touch and fake British accent have got to be good for something.
Using a powerful telekinetic force, you can send people and objects flying. Does not require you to shout words of power in a dramatic fashion to use.
A staple in any Witcher's arsenal, the Igni Sign sets things on fire and burns them to ashes.
The Sign of Yrden can be used to stun and trap enemies, either to create an opening or as an escape tool.
This enemy has been trapped by the Yrden Sign.
Draining for Quen Sign.
Does what it says.
A ward of electrical energy shields you from damage, but rapidly drains your mana and prevents it from regenerating.
The Heliotrop Sign provides resistance to magical attacks and quickens your instincts and reflexes.
Pull food and drink out of thin air! The only reason you haven't ended world hunger yet is that this spell takes far too long to recharge.
One Arcane Missile, you spell-fizzler.
Two Arcane Missiles, your standard fare.
Three arcane missiles, don't get used to it.
Fire an arcane missile off into the darkness! The effect is stable most of the time, but sometimes you get more, sometimes you get less...
Your counterspell has silenced your enemy and reduced its magical resistances.
I'ma charging my mana! Your spells are more potent, but cost much more to cast!
I'ma charging my mana! Your spells are more potent, but cost much more to cast!
I'ma charging my mana! Your spells are more potent, but cost much more to cast!
Does what it says.
Does what it says.
Does what it says.
Testing, testing.
Testing, testing.
Testing, testing.
Testing, testing.
Blast your enemy with raw mana and charge yourself with it at the same time!
Create a gem to store away some of your mana for later! Using the gem will fry your energies a little due to the surge of power, but better that than running dry, eh?
That surge of energy sure fried something somewhere - you cannot use another mana gem for a short while. This debuff cannot be removed through usual curse removal methods.
Well, snap. There goes your magic.
You have gained ultimate wizard power - without even needing to get all six avian wizard ninjas first!
Reduce, reuse, recycle. While this buff is active, every spell you cast has a chance to convert any spare magical power into wayward blasts. Handle with care around shopkeepers.
Phew, that debugging sure was tiring.
Go on, figure out what makes this thing tick and then rewrite the enchantment - but without the corruption.
